steps.title: Identify what 'renewed sense of agency and authority' requires
steps.content: The claim requires showing soldiers with active power and control. The decisive signal is language showing active, confident assertion of power—physical posture, forceful movement, or explicit claims to dominance.

steps.title: Find the quotation showing active dominance
steps.content: C displays all three signals: the soldiers “threw out their chests” (confident posture), “spurred their horses to a gallop” (forceful movement), and “laid claims of possession to the earth” (explicit dominance). The others show melancholy ceremony (A), landscape observation (B), or literal submission (D)—none convey the active power the claim requires. This matches choice C — C is correct.
